'''Requel Sorm''' was a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]] on [[Citadel Station]] after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. By [[3951 BBY]], Sorm was ranked second of the swoop racers on the station.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
